pieces.title: Rock Renaissance Event Poster
pieces.background: A poster design created for a graphic design coursework assignment, promoting a fictional music event with emphasis on hierarchy, typography, and visual rhythm.
pieces.process: Explored multiple layout directions in sketch and digital draft form, iterating on type scale, contrast, and image treatment before settling on a final composition.
pieces.result: A finished print-ready poster that communicates event details clearly while maintaining a strong graphic identity.

pieces.title: BSA Eco-Futurism Fashion Show Event Graphic
pieces.background: The BSA Eco-Futurism Fashion Show is a yearly event that showcases the work of the BSA Fashion Show Committee. The event is held in the spring and features a variety of fashion shows, including eco-friendly fashion, futurism fashion, and more.
pieces.process: The process of creating the event graphic involved a lot of research into the BSA Eco-Futurism Fashion Show and the fashion show industry. I also looked at a lot of other event graphics to get a sense of what is possible.

pieces.result: The result is a graphic that is both visually appealing and informative. It is a graphic that is both visually appealing and informative. It is a graphic that is both visually appealing and informative.

pieces.title: 'Get Out The Vote' Poster
pieces.background: A poster design created for a graphic design coursework assignment centered on civic engagement and voter participation.
pieces.process: Iterated on messaging hierarchy, visual symbolism, and typographic voice to produce a poster that communicates urgency and action.
pieces.result: A finished poster design that advocates for voter participation through bold graphic communication.
